name: Doris Day's Peach Angel Food Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Ascorbic acid or lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the angel-food mix according to directions.
2. Allow the mix to cool completely.
3. Cut the cooled mix into 3 layers.
4. Whip the heavy cream until it forms stiff peaks.
5. Peel, slice, and sweeten the peaches to taste.
6. Dissolve the ascorbic acid or lemon juice in a small amount of water and add it to the whipped cream to prevent discoloration.
7. Spread half of the whipped cream on one layer of cake.
8. Cover with sliced peaches.
9. Repeat steps 4-7, stacking the layers on top of each other.
10. Top off with additional sliced peaches and whipped cream.
11. Serve immediately using a saw-toothed knife for cutting.
